name: go2-inspect
description: Open-vocabulary object inspection over the Unitree Go2's front camera: describe what to look for in plain English, watch an annotated live stream, and capture annotated frames + per-object crops into a report.

variables.name: INSPECT_PORT
variables.description: Port for the inspection web UI — open http://<device>:<port> in a browser

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Go2 main-controller IP — the WebRTC camera source
variables.prompt: Go2 main-controller IP — the WebRTC camera source

variables.name: NETWORK_INTERFACE
variables.description: NIC on the deploy host that has the 192.168.123.0/24 address. On the Go2's onboard Jetson this is normally 'eth0'.
